shared_facts: The US launched airstrikes against Iranian military targets on Saturday night.

shared_facts: The MV Barima ferry, carrying 116 people, capsized near Iron Punt while traveling from Georgetown to Port Kaituma.
A distress call was issued late Saturday night.
A search and rescue operation involving state and private vessels is underway.
Guyana's Public Works Minister Juan Edghill confirmed the incident and the involvement of rescue vessels.
latest_clusters.synthesis: The MV Barima ferry capsized near Iron Punt in Guyana while transporting 116 people from Georgetown to Port Kaituma. A search operation involving state and private vessels was initiated following a distress call on Saturday night. Reports regarding the current number of rescued passengers differ between sources.
latest_clusters.confidence: CONTESTED. The sources provide significantly different figures regarding the number of people rescued from the ferry.
